creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text:
"libtls.so.10" indicates that your openntpd package was built with option RESSL. This requires LibreSSL >=2.3.2, currently available as security/libressl-devel, so you need to install that package along with the openntpd one.

libressl-2.2.6 is too old!

I don't know how you managed to install the openntpd package without the required libressl one.
